---
name: Request source code
about: Ask for a copy of the source code for CK Image & PDF Reducer
title: "[Source Request] "
labels: source-request
assignees: ''
---

**How would you like to receive it?**
Let us know an email address or preferred method, and we'll send over the current source (`image_reducer_studio.pyw`) at no charge.

**App version you're using**
Check Help → About in the app for the version number.

**Anything else?**
Optional — e.g. why you're asking, if you plan to modify/redistribute it, etc.
